metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins and supporting CLIs

plugins.name: monarch
plugins.description: Personal finance data from Monarch Money. Check account balances, search transactions, view budget vs actuals, and track cash flow trends. Commands: /monarch, /monarch:transactions, /monarch:budget, /monarch:cashflow, /monarch:status

plugins.name: imdb
plugins.description: IMDB movie and TV data. Search films, look up cast and box office, browse Top 250 movies/shows, and check upcoming releases. Commands: /imdb, /imdb:movie, /imdb:person, /imdb:top

plugins.name: dream-team
plugins.description: Avatar framework and marketplace — create, recruit, consult, review, plan, and coach with AI expert agents. Ships with 6 curated avatars (Beck, Martin, Evans, Kim, Cherny, Steinberger) and 1 domain team.
